## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `armature ...`
2. With this `armature.yaml` config: ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error output if available.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.12.3]
- Armature version: [e.g., 0.1.0]
- IDE integration: [e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, none]

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or config files.
